steps.title: Check current traefik deployment
steps.description:
Verify your traefik version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik
helm list -n traefik 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working traefik installation.

steps.title: Review traefik configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant traefik configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik
kubectl get configmap -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=traefik
```
**Feature**

OpenTelemetry Support - https://opentelemetry.io/

It seems OpenTracing (https://opentracing.io/) and OpenCensus have merged to form OpenTelemetry 

Could we look to add support / migrate in a future release.

steps.title: Apply the fix for OpenTelemetry Support
steps.description:
Would the Traefik team be interested in having a community member take this on?  I'd be happy to take a stab at it. If you are, what shape would you prefer it to take? I'm imagining that it makes sense to add support for OpenTelemetry alongside OpenCensus at this time, but I also understand that
```yaml
tracing:
  opentelemetry:
    exporters:
      otlp:
        endpoint: localhost:4317
        protocol: grpc
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik
kubectl get events -n traefik --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "OpenTelemetry Support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Would the Traefik team be interested in having a community member take this on?  I'd be happy to take a stab at it.
codeSnippets:
tracing:
  opentelemetry:
    exporters:
      otlp:
        endpoint: localhost:4317
        protocol: grpc

opentelemetry:
  exporters:
    otlp:
      endpoint:  localhost:4317
      protocol: grpc
  tracingEnabled: true
  metricsEnabled: true

opentelemetry:
  tracing:
    exporters:
      otlp:
        endpoint:  localhost:4317
        protocol: grpc
  metrics:
    exporters:
      otlp:
        endpoint:  localhost:4317
        protocol: grpc

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with traefik installed or the issue environment reproducible.
